purpose: Pre-launch product teaser — product partially hidden, revealed, or shrouded to build anticipation for a drop or new arrival. Suspense-driven conversion.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Product drop teaser photography creating anticipation and mystery, {product_silhouette_or_partially_hidden} — {reveal_technique}: silhouette behind frosted glass, wrapped in premium fabric, partially emerged from shadow, product-shaped void in contrasting surface, {brand_color_palette} dramatic lighting with high contrast chiaroscuro — single directional light source from side or above, deep shadow areas obscuring product details while hinting at shape, {teaser_mood_descriptor} — mysterious, premium, cinematic, single question mark or glow from behind product optional, composition leaving deliberate empty space for countdown text overlay post-generation, hyper-realistic surface texture on reveal elements, shot on 85mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: fully visible product (must maintain mystery)
Avoid in output: bright even lighting (must feel cinematic/dramatic)
notes: Intents: launch. Saudi adaptation guidance: Drop culture and product reveal is highly effective for Saudi Gen-Z and millennial consumers, particularly in fashion, fragrance, and limited-edition F&B. Reserve countdown aesthetic for genuine drops — overuse dulls urgency signal. Min brand maturity 30 days to ensure audience exists before teaser campaign. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 1-3 days before launch. Compliance level: standard.
